allow: Bash(node -e "const q=require\('./questions.json'\); console.log\('count:', q.length\); console.log\('first:', JSON.stringify\(q[0],null,2\)\); const topics={}; q.forEach\(x=>topics[x.topic]=\(topics[x.topic]||0\)+1\); console.log\('topics:', JSON.stringify\(topics,null,2\)\); const diff={}; q.forEach\(x=>diff[x.difficulty]=\(diff[x.difficulty]||0\)+1\); console.log\('difficulty:', diff\);")

PowerShell(Get-Command node,npm,pnpm,yarn -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name,Source; Write-Output "---nvm---"; if \(Test-Path "$env:APPDATA\\nvm"\) { ls "$env:APPDATA\\nvm" }; Write-Output "---programfiles---"; if \(Test-Path "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs"\) { ls "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs" })

PowerShell(New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force "public" | Out-Null; Copy-Item "questions.json" "public\\questions.json" -Force; Write-Output "copied"; Write-Output "---node check---"; $env:Path = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","User"\); try { node --version; npm --version } catch { Write-Output "node not on path yet" })

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5173 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Write-Output "freed 5173")
